title: UC Berkeley · Flow Direction Around Strawberry Creek
caption: Hydrologic flow-direction analysis around Strawberry Creek using a 10-foot UC Berkeley DEM. Layers include predicted flow accumulation and a directional raster classified across the eight cardinal flow values. ESPM C110, October 2023.

title: Fire Risk in the Berkeley Area
caption: Fire-risk overlay for the Berkeley area combining road networks, slopes greater than 20%, and federal/state/local/other land-management classifications, with high-risk federal land highlighted. ESPM C110, November 2023.
